basedOnDefaultsVersion: FLOW-01 v1.0.0 (XIIGEN_FREEDOM_DEFAULTS — fresh root install, no cascade hop)

lineage.introduces: Fresh root install with zero FREEDOM overrides; third-party tenant for V-13(D) cross-tenant separation confirmation; deliberately not part of the acme→northwind cascade

deploymentInstructions.seedMethod: no-op — tessera does not seed any FREEDOM keys for FLOW-01; their AsyncLocalStorage context falls through to the platform v1.0.0 defaults

overridesNote: Tessera Collective installs FLOW-01 directly from the xiigen-platform v1.0.0 baseline and does not introduce any FREEDOM-config overrides. Their tenant context returns the platform defaults: rate_limit=60, ttl=86400, inviter='you', community='our community' — exactly as XIIGEN_FREEDOM_DEFAULTS specifies. Drift comparison at row 8: tenant-c-tessera-v1.0.1 vs platform-source MUST be 0 px (zero overrides + server-side-only adaptation surface = pixel-identical client renders).

testsRunForThisProfile: FC-ADAPT-1 (default fallback for unknown/non-cascade tenant — covers tessera by construction)
verificationContract.note: Tessera does not have its own override-bearing test class; the existing FC-ADAPT-1 test class covers the contract for non-cascade tenants (default values returned in the absence of overrides).

machineInvariantsPreserved: Event names: AccountCreated, VerificationEmailRequested, VerificationCompleted, OnboardingCompleted
Material type literals: workspace_setup, flow_tutorial, community_invitation
Idempotency key format and outbox ordering (storeDocument before enqueue)

v15DriftContract.expectedDrift: 0 px on every PNG (byte-identical to platform-source baseline)
v15DriftContract.rationale: Tessera has zero FREEDOM overrides for FLOW-01 and falls through to platform v1.0.0 defaults under their AsyncLocalStorage context; therefore the rendered output of every kiosk page is pixel-identical to the platform-source capture
v15DriftContract.observedDrift: 0 px (V-13 instance D + V-15 instance C drift comparison: 252/252 byte-identical pairs vs platform-source AND vs tenant-a-acme-v1.0.1; PASS per contract component 1)
